usage: set_power_rail_display [-help] [-customized_range <range>] [-enable_auto_apply <true|false>] [-enable_percentage_range <true|false>] [-enable_result_browser <true|false>] [-enable_rlrp <true|false>] [-enable_voltage_sources <true|false>] [-filter_color <on|off|color name>] [-filter_max <filter_max>] [-filter_min <filter_min>] [-grid <on|off>] [-legend {off ne nw se sw}] [-plot [none ir tc rc rj jpeak jrms sem_fit sem_rms sem_avg sem_peak sem_ddt rv_sem_rms rv_sem_avg rv_sem_mavg rv_sem_peak unc ivdn ivdd ipc ipceiv isweiv effr thermal tile_thermal cvi1 pi pv pix tot vu ibu vc ibc er rlrp res rv_rms rv_peak rv_avg ivde ip ip_i ip_s ip_l ip_clk ip_tr ipd ipd_i ipd_s ipd_t ipd_l freq slack activity td cap load dd node_effr icm tpd ptpd fit sem_jrms sem_javg sem_jpeak rv_sem_jrms rv_sem_javg rv_sem_jpeak rv_sem_jlpeak rv_sem_jspeak unc_inst unc_pinnodes lunc_inst]] [-range_max <max>] [-range_min <min>] [-reset_color_scale] [-thermal_layer_name <thermal_layer>] [-tile_count_x <interger> -tile_count_y <interger>] [-tile_size_x <float> -tile_size_y <float>]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -customized_range
options.description: set customized range for basic mode

options.name: -enable_auto_apply
options.description: enable/disable auto apply for colorscale

options.name: -enable_percentage_range
options.description: enable percentage range. Default is false.

options.name: -enable_result_browser
options.description: enable result browser. Default is false.

options.name: -enable_rlrp
options.description: enable rlrp path display. Default is false.

options.name: -enable_voltage_sources
options.description: enable voltage sources. Default is false.

options.name: -filter_color
options.description: show filtered out resistors with color or off. Reserved and no implemntation

options.name: -filter_max
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale filter.

options.name: -filter_min
options.description: specifies the min value of color scale filter.

options.name: -grid
options.description: show grid for vu or vc plot

options.name: -legend
options.description: off - turn off the legend ne - north east nw - north west se - south east sw - south west

options.name: -plot
options.description: [none ir tc rc rj jpeak jrms sem_fit sem_rms sem_avg sem_peak sem_ddt rv_sem_rms rv_sem_avg rv_sem_mavg rv_sem_peak unc ivdn ivdd ipc ipceiv isweiv effr thermal tile_thermal cvi1 pi pv pix tot vu ibu vc ibc er rlrp res rv_rms rv_peak rv_avg ivde ip ip_i ip_s ip_l ip_clk ip_tr ipd ipd_i ipd_s ipd_t ipd_l freq slack activity td cap load dd node_effr icm tpd ptpd fit sem_jrms sem_javg sem_jpeak rv_sem_jrms rv_sem_javg rv_sem_jpeak rv_sem_jlpeak rv_sem_jspeak unc_inst unc_pinnodes lunc_inst] none - Clear ir - IRdrop tc - Tap Current rc - Resistor Current rj - Iavg/Ilimit jpeak - Ipeak/Ilimit jrms - Irms/Ilimit sem_fit - Failure In Time sem_rms - RMS Current sem_avg - AVG Current sem_peak - PEAK Current sem_ddt - Detailed Delta Tempertaure rv_sem_rms - RV RMS Current rv_sem_avg - RV AVG Current rv_sem_mavg - RV MAX AVG Current rv_sem_peak - RV PEAK Current unc - unconnected power-grid sections ivdn - net based voltage drop ivdd - domain based drop ipc - Instance Peak Current ipceiv - EIV Window instance peak current isweiv - EIV Window instance switch status effr - effective resistance thermal - Instance thermal tile_thermal - Tile Thermal cvi1 - Customized file 1 pi - power-gate current I/Idsat pv - power-gate voltage drop pix - power-gate current tot - turn-on time vu - voltage drop across package ibu - inter die bump vu er - electromigration risk rlrp - instance resistance of LRP res - Grid Resistance rv_rms - RV RMS rv_peak - RV PEAK rv_avg - RV AVG ivde - Instance voltage drop in ESD ip - instance total power ip_i - instance internal power ip_s - instance switching power ip_l - instance leakage power ipd - instance total power density ipd_i - instance internal power density ipd_s - instance switching power density ipd_t - instance total power density ipd_l - instance leakage power density freq - fastest frequency domain for instance ip_tr - instance toggle rate slack - worst slack for instance activity - instance activity td - transition density for instance cap - power-grid capacitance load - output loading capacitance for instance dd - decap density node_effr - noded based reff icm - instance current movie tpd - tile power density ptpd - profiling tile power density fit - failures in time sem_jrms - RMS I/Ilimit sem_javg - AVG I/Ilimit sem_jpeak - PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jrms - RV RMS I/Ilimit rv_sem_javg - RV AVG I/Ilimit rv_sem_jpeak - RV PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jlpeak - RV Long PEAK I/Ilimit rv_sem_jspeak - RV Short PEAK I/Ilimit unc_inst - Unconnected Inst Pins unc_pinnodes - Unconnected/WeaklyConnected Pin Nodes lunc_inst - Logically Unconnected Inst

options.name: -range_max
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale.

options.name: -range_min
options.description: specifies the max value of color scale.

options.name: -reset_color_scale
options.description: reset color scale

options.name: -thermal_layer_name
options.description: set current thermal_layer_name for thermal plot

options.name: -tile_count_x
options.description: set x tile count of tpd plot.

options.name: -tile_count_y
options.description: set y tile count of tpd plot.

options.name: -tile_size_x
options.description: set x tile size of tpd plot.

options.name: -tile_size_y
options.description: set y tile size of tpd plot.
